name: environment_predictive_queue_begins_mesa_st_lt
premise: A heat dome forced rolling blackouts; a data center’s diesel reserves are contested against hospital backup priority. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment predictive queue begins mesa st lt has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Leila Okoye
agents.identity: I am Leila Okoye, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Diallo
agents.identity: I am Fatima Diallo, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of long term.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of short term even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Leila Okoye must choose under short term versus long term. What does Leila Okoye do?
